falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would invalidate the HOLD signal by confirming a trend reversal against the bottom pattern

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume surges to 200% above the 30-day average on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Extreme volume would indicate a confirmed breakout or blowoff move, contradicting the current uncertainty

falsification_conditions.condition: The RSI(14) crosses above 70 and stays above for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained overbought conditions would refute the bottom pattern thesis and confirm a bullish phase

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
